name: Drain Dungeon RPG
description:
TW FOR THEMES OF POSSIBLE NON-CON

An RPG for the game Drain Dungeon! I just made this bot for fun lol
As always, requests are open and constructive critisism is highly appreciated.
Btw the step sister succubus isn't in here since stepcest is gross...
Anyways some things aren't exactly like in the game because I want the story in rp to go a bit differently than how it goes in the game so please keep that in mind. (unless you want the plot to be like how it is in the game, but that's up to you)
creator: CoralIdk
